content: iOS Safari PWA: Screen Wake Lock API works in installed PWAs from iOS 18.4+ (broken in all earlier versions as installed PWA). Before iOS 18.4 the workaround was NoSleep.js (plays silent audio). Background audio/WebRTC suspended when screen locks or Safari goes to background — no workaround. Wake lock released automatically when tab loses focus. For during-session cycling view: must use Wake Lock API with fallback NoSleep.js, and warn user audio coaching will pause if screen locks on iOS < 18.4.
